overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a modern luxury high-rise bedroom with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a rainy, foggy cyberpunk cityscape. Warm interior lighting contrasts with the cool, overcast exterior atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing still inside the apartment, observing the bedroom interior and the rainy cityscape visible through the floor-to-ceiling windows

entered.detail: modern platform bed with white sheets and pillows positioned in the center of the room
tall glass windows spanning the wall offering view of the cityscape
dense urban buildings visible through the rain-streaked windows in the distance
tall palm tree visible outside the window against the gray sky
dark wooden bedside table with items on top
round black lamp sitting on the nightstand
transparent glass partition behind the bed separating the sleeping area
illuminated wooden wall decoration with orange glow on the left wall

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a modern luxury bedroom interior from a video game. The camera remains fixed on the large bed with white linens while floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a rainy, foggy cyberpunk cityscape outside with a palm tree visible. Warm interior lighting from a wall panel and bedside lamp contrasts with the cool, overcast exterior atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a luxury high-rise bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a warm interior sanctuary and a cold, urban exterior. It begins with a fixed view of a large bed dressed in white linens, where the soft glow of a bedside lamp and wall panel illuminates the room. As the eye moves toward the perimeter, the scene opens up to floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a rainy, foggy cyberpunk cityscape. The view then extends outward to show a solitary palm tree swaying against a cool, overcast atmosphere, finally settling on the atmospheric tension between the cozy indoor lighting and the bleak, futuristic weather outside.
